div.h1: Cross-Domain: Command Buffers as Event Sourcing

p.em: The architecture pattern powering deferred execution, distributed systems, and version control.

div.p: Engineers: By implementing an ECS Command Buffer, you have already built an Event Sourcing engine. Exploit this for Networking, Save-Games, and Tools.
Delta Sync Serialize the Buffer instead of the whole World state.
Bug Reproduction Record user commands + seeds. Re-run for bit-perfect failure.
Command Inversion Store 'inverse' commands. e.g., Add becomes Remove.
